rules.description: Bypass cache for EVE health and refresh endpoints
Cache canonical LP API reads using origin cache headers
rules.expression: (http.host eq "eve.ayokei.to" and http.request.method in {"GET" "HEAD"} and (http.request.uri.path in {"/lp/api/offers/top" "/lp/api/offers/top.csv" "/lp/api/corps" "/lp/api/movers" "/api/missions" "/api/arcs" "/api/agents" "/api/contract-prices" "/api/burners"} or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/api/missions/*" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/api/arcs/*") and http.request.uri.path ne "/api/missions/health")

rules.description: Cache frontend static assets using origin cache headers
rules.expression: (http.host eq "eve.ayokei.to" and http.request.method in {"GET" "HEAD"} and (http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.js" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.css" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.png" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.jpg" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.jpeg" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.gif" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.svg" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.ico" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.webp" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.avif" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.woff" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/lp/*.woff2" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/shared/*.js" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/shared/*.css" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.js" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.css" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.png" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.jpg" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.jpeg" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.gif" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.svg" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.ico" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.webp" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.avif" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.woff" or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*.woff2"))

rules.description: eve-html-shell-cache — Cache navigated HTML shells using origin cache headers
rules.expression: (http.host eq "eve.ayokei.to") and (http.request.method in {"GET" "HEAD"}) and (http.request.uri.path in {"/" "/lp/" "/lp/about.html" "/missions/" "/missions/browse" "/agents/"} or http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/arc/*" or (http.request.uri.path wildcard r"/missions/*" and not (ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".js") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".css") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".png") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".jpg") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".jpeg") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".gif") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".svg") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".ico") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".webp") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".avif") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".woff") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".woff2") or ends_with(http.request.uri.path, ".json"))))
